The '''DXR6 Carbine''' had a longer range than any other [[Blaster carbine/Legends|carbine]] on the market and dealt a reasonable amount of damage. It could be seen wielded by [[Stormtrooper/Legends|stormtroopers]] as well as [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunters]] and the [[Sith Shadows|Sith Shadow]] thugs.

==History==
During the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], bounty hunters often used the DXR6 for its long range, firepower, and durability. It operated efficiently in all weather conditions.
